name: Aural Exciter (audio chain v1)
author: KB2UKA
description: Aural-Exciter-style top-end harmonic enhancement — third of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 blocks per issue #332. Biquad high-pass filter feeds a tanh waveshaper to synthesise upper harmonics, then mixes the harmonics back over the dry signal. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. Live SVG saturation-curve viz, three rotary knobs (Frequency / Drive / Mix), bypass toggle.
